meta.topic: warfarin reversal in mechanical mitral valve bleeding

questions.topic: warfarin reversal in mechanical mitral valve bleeding

stem.en: Review the client record and answer the case-study items.
stem.zh: 请查看患者病历，并回答病例题。

title.en: Unfolding case: supratherapeutic warfarin after mechanical mitral valve replacement
title.zh: 展开式病例：机械性二尖瓣置换术后华法林抗凝过量

summary.en: A 63-year-old client is readmitted 12 days after mechanical mitral valve replacement with mucocutaneous bleeding, a supratherapeutic INR, recent poor intake, and recent over-the-counter naproxen exposure.
summary.zh: 一名63岁患者在机械性二尖瓣置换术后第12天因黏膜皮肤出血、INR过高、近期进食差及自行使用非处方萘普生而再次入院。

content.en:
History: 63-year-old man, mechanical mitral valve replacement 12 days ago; chronic atrial fibrillation; heart failure with reduced ejection fraction; type 2 diabetes; mild chronic kidney disease.
Home medications: warfarin 7.5 mg nightly, metoprolol succinate 50 mg daily, lisinopril 10 mg daily, furosemide 20 mg daily, potassium chloride 20 mEq daily, pantoprazole 40 mg daily, acetaminophen as needed.
Target INR for mechanical mitral valve: 2.5-3.5. INR was 3.0 at discharge and 3.2 at cardiology follow-up one day later.
Client report: poor appetite, nausea, low fluid intake. Wife manages pill organizer and gave naproxen 220 mg twice over the past 2 days for shoulder pain. No herbal supplements.
content.zh:
病史：63岁男性，12天前行机械性二尖瓣置换术；慢性房颤；射血分数降低型心力衰竭；2型糖尿病；轻度慢性肾病。
家庭用药：华法林7.5 mg每晚，琥珀酸美托洛尔50 mg每日，赖诺普利10 mg每日，呋塞米20 mg每日，氯化钾20 mEq每日，泮托拉唑40 mg每日，必要时对乙酰氨基酚。
机械性二尖瓣目标INR：2.5-3.5。出院时INR为3.0，出院后第1天心内科复查INR为3.2。
患者报告：食欲差、恶心、饮水少。妻子负责整理药盒，并在过去2天因肩痛给患者服用萘普生220 mg两次。未使用草药补充剂。

content.en:
Presentation: blood on toothbrush, blood-tinged saliva, new large ecchymoses on both forearms and left shin, and a nosebleed last evening that stopped after 10 minutes of direct pressure. Denies headache, confusion, focal weakness, hematuria, melena, hematemesis, and hemoptysis. Reports mild dizziness when standing.
Vital signs: T 36.9 C, HR 88 irregularly irregular, BP 106/64, RR 18, SpO2 95% on room air. Alert and oriented x4.
Assessment: pale skin; slow gingival oozing; no active epistaxis; sternal incision clean and dry; mechanical valve click audible; bibasilar fine crackles unchanged from discharge; abdomen soft and nontender; urine clear yellow.
Labs: INR 5.2, PT 58.4 seconds, aPTT 42 seconds, hemoglobin 11.4 g/dL (12.8 g/dL at discharge), hematocrit 34%, platelets 188,000/uL, BUN 34 mg/dL, creatinine 1.4 mg/dL, albumin 3.0 g/dL. Urinalysis: no blood. Stool guaiac: pending.
content.zh:
表现：刷牙时牙刷上有血、唾液带血，双前臂和左小腿出现新的大面积瘀斑，昨晚鼻出血，经直接按压10分钟后停止。否认头痛、意识混乱、局灶性无力、血尿、黑便、呕血和咯血。站立时轻度头晕。
生命体征：体温36.9°C，心率88次/分且节律绝对不齐，血压106/64 mmHg，呼吸18次/分，室内空气SpO2 95%。神志清楚，定向力完整。
评估：皮肤苍白；牙龈缓慢渗血；无活动性鼻出血；胸骨切口清洁干燥；可闻及机械瓣声音；双肺底细湿啰音与出院时相同；腹部软、无压痛；尿液清黄。
化验：INR 5.2，PT 58.4秒，aPTT 42秒，血红蛋白11.4 g/dL（出院时12.8 g/dL），红细胞压积34%，血小板188,000/uL，BUN 34 mg/dL，肌酐1.4 mg/dL，白蛋白3.0 g/dL。尿检：无血。粪便隐血：待查。

content.en:
ED provider orders warfarin held pending INR results. Cardiology hospitalist evaluates the client and orders: continue holding warfarin; vitamin K 2.5 mg PO once now; recheck INR in 6 hours; continue IV normal saline at 75 mL/hr; stool guaiac with next bowel movement; neurologic checks every 4 hours.
Nursing actions: fall precautions, telemetry, strict intake and output, soft-bristle oral care, avoidance of IM injections, medication reconciliation, and provider notification of naproxen exposure. Stool guaiac at 1300 is negative. Vital signs remain stable at 1400; gingival oozing has not worsened and urine remains clear yellow.
content.zh:
急诊医嘱在INR结果明确前暂停华法林。心内科住院医评估后医嘱：继续暂停华法林；立即口服维生素K 2.5 mg一次；6小时后复查INR；继续0.9%氯化钠75 mL/hr静脉输注；下次排便时查粪便隐血；每4小时神经系统检查。
护理措施：跌倒预防、持续心电监护、严格记录出入量、软毛牙刷口腔护理、避免肌内注射、药物核对，并将萘普生暴露情况通知医生。1300粪便隐血阴性。1400生命体征稳定；牙龈渗血未加重，尿液仍清黄。

title.zh: 阶段2：1600-2200 部分逆转与健康教育

content.en:
Repeat labs at 1800: INR 4.6, hemoglobin 11.0 g/dL, creatinine 1.3 mg/dL. Vital signs: T 37.0 C, HR 84, BP 118/72, RR 16, SpO2 96% on room air. Provider orders: continue holding warfarin; no additional vitamin K now; recheck INR in the morning.
Teaching completed with client and wife: purpose of warfarin for mechanical valve and atrial fibrillation; target INR 2.5-3.5; keep dietary vitamin K intake consistent rather than eliminating green vegetables; avoid NSAIDs unless specifically approved by the anticoagulation prescriber; call the anticoagulation clinic before starting new medications; report hematuria, melena, hematemesis, persistent epistaxis, heavy gum bleeding, expanding bruises, severe headache, confusion, vision changes, dizziness, fainting, or any fall/head injury.
At 2000: gingival oozing has stopped; no new ecchymoses; urine clear yellow; neurologically intact; HR 82, BP 120/74.
content.zh:
1800复查：INR 4.6，血红蛋白11.0 g/dL，肌酐1.3 mg/dL。生命体征：体温37.0°C，心率84次/分，血压118/72 mmHg，呼吸16次/分，室内空气SpO2 96%。医嘱：继续暂停华法林；暂不追加维生素K；明晨复查INR。
已对患者和妻子完成教育：华法林用于机械瓣及房颤抗凝；目标INR 2.5-3.5；饮食中维生素K应保持稳定，而不是完全不吃绿色蔬菜；除非抗凝处方医生明确批准，否则避免NSAID；开始任何新药前联系抗凝门诊；如出现血尿、黑便、呕血、持续鼻出血、明显牙龈出血、瘀斑扩大、严重头痛、意识混乱、视物改变、头晕、晕厥，或任何跌倒/头部受伤，应立即报告。
2000：牙龈渗血停止；无新瘀斑；尿液清黄；神经系统完整；心率82次/分，血压120/74 mmHg。

content.en:
At 0500, the client reports bright pink urine. Foley bag contains pink to light-red urine without visible clots. Urine output over previous 8 hours: 480 mL.
0600 vital signs: T 37.1 C, HR 98, BP 100/60, RR 20, SpO2 95% on room air. Client reports lightheadedness when sitting up and mild diffuse abdominal discomfort. No headache, confusion, visual changes, or focal neurologic symptoms. Abdomen soft with mild suprapubic and bilateral flank tenderness, no guarding or rebound. Stool guaiac overnight: positive.
0645 stat labs: INR 6.8, PT 76.2 seconds, hemoglobin 9.2 g/dL, hematocrit 27.6%, platelets 174,000/uL, BUN 42 mg/dL, creatinine 1.5 mg/dL, lactate 2.4 mmol/L. Urinalysis: large blood, RBCs too numerous to count, no bacteria, no casts.
content.zh:
0500，患者报告尿液呈鲜粉红色。导尿袋内尿液呈粉红至浅红色，无肉眼可见血块。过去8小时尿量480 mL。
0600生命体征：体温37.1°C，心率98次/分，血压100/60 mmHg，呼吸20次/分，室内空气SpO2 95%。患者诉坐起时头晕，并有轻度弥漫性腹部不适。无头痛、意识混乱、视物改变或局灶性神经症状。腹部软，耻骨上及双侧腰腹部轻压痛，无肌紧张或反跳痛。夜间粪便隐血：阳性。
0645急查化验：INR 6.8，PT 76.2秒，血红蛋白9.2 g/dL，红细胞压积27.6%，血小板174,000/uL，BUN 42 mg/dL，肌酐1.5 mg/dL，乳酸2.4 mmol/L。尿检：大量血，红细胞多到无法计数，无细菌，无管型。

title.zh: 阶段3：0700-1200 逆转治疗与再评估

content.en:
Provider orders: vitamin K 10 mg IV diluted in normal saline and infused over 30 minutes; type and crossmatch 2 units PRBCs; administer 4-factor PCC per weight/INR protocol; hold all anticoagulation; GI consult; urology consult; noncontrast head CT; continue close neurologic and hemodynamic monitoring.
Nursing actions: vitamin K infused by pump over 30 minutes while monitoring for flushing, dyspnea, chest tightness, and hypotension; 4-factor PCC verified with a second nurse and administered per protocol; PRBC transfusion initiated; vital signs every 15 minutes during acute reversal; strict intake/output and hourly urine color assessment; neurologic checks continued. Head CT is negative for intracranial hemorrhage.
1100-1200 status: HR 88, BP 114/70, urine light pink and clearing, INR 3.8, hemoglobin 9.8 g/dL after 1 unit PRBC with second unit infusing, abdominal tenderness mild and stable. GI and urology evaluations are pending. Warfarin has not yet been restarted.
content.zh:
医嘱：维生素K 10 mg静脉给药，用生理盐水稀释并在30分钟内输注；交叉配血2单位浓缩红细胞；按体重/INR方案给予四因子PCC；暂停所有抗凝药；胃肠科会诊；泌尿科会诊；无增强头颅CT；继续密切神经系统和血流动力学监测。
护理措施：使用输液泵在30分钟内输注维生素K，同时监测潮红、呼吸困难、胸闷和低血压；四因子PCC经双人核对后按方案给药；开始输注浓缩红细胞；急性逆转期间每15分钟测生命体征；严格记录出入量并每小时评估尿色；继续神经系统检查。头颅CT阴性，未见颅内出血。
1100-1200状态：心率88次/分，血压114/70 mmHg，尿液浅粉红并逐渐转清，INR 3.8，输注1单位浓缩红细胞后血红蛋白9.8 g/dL，第二单位正在输注，腹部压痛轻且稳定。胃肠科和泌尿科评估待完成。尚未重新开始华法林。

stem.en: At 1030, warfarin 7.5 mg nightly appears on the home medication list. The INR is 5.2 and the client has active gingival oozing and new ecchymoses. Which nursing action is most appropriate?
stem.zh: 1030时，家庭用药清单中有华法林7.5 mg每晚。患者INR为5.2，并有活动性牙龈渗血和新的瘀斑。最合适的护理措施是什么？

options.en: Administer the scheduled warfarin because the client has a mechanical mitral valve.
options.zh: 因患者有机械性二尖瓣，照常给予计划剂量华法林。

options.en: Hold the warfarin, verify the hold order or obtain clarification, and notify the provider of the INR and bleeding findings.
options.zh: 暂停华法林，核实暂停医嘱或取得澄清，并将INR及出血表现通知医生。

options.en: Give half of the warfarin dose and recheck the INR after the medication is absorbed.
options.zh: 给予半量华法林，并在药物吸收后复查INR。

options.en: Ask the wife whether she wants the warfarin held because she manages the pill organizer at home.
options.zh: 询问妻子是否希望暂停华法林，因为她在家负责整理药盒。

correct.en: The nurse should hold and clarify a high-risk medication when current objective data show likely harm. INR 5.2 with active mucocutaneous bleeding makes another warfarin dose unsafe; notifying the provider preserves the medication-order chain while preventing iatrogenic worsening.
correct.zh: 当当前客观资料显示用药可能造成伤害时，护士应暂停并澄清高危药物。INR 5.2且有活动性黏膜皮肤出血时，再给华法林不安全；通知医生既维持医嘱流程，又避免医源性加重。

byChoice.en: The mechanical valve explains why anticoagulation is usually required, but it does not justify giving warfarin during active bleeding with a critically high INR.
byChoice.zh: 机械瓣说明通常需要抗凝，但不能作为在活动性出血且INR明显过高时继续给华法林的理由。

byChoice.en: This is the safest action: hold the unsafe dose, clarify the order, and report the assessment data that require provider management.
byChoice.zh: 这是最安全的做法：暂停不安全剂量，澄清医嘱，并报告需要医生处理的评估资料。

byChoice.en: A partial dose still adds anticoagulant effect and is not a nursing solution to supratherapeutic INR with bleeding.
byChoice.zh: 半量仍会增加抗凝作用，不能作为护士处理INR过高伴出血的方案。

byChoice.en: The wife is important for medication teaching, but the decision is based on clinical data and provider orders, not family preference.
byChoice.zh: 妻子对用药教育很重要，但是否给药取决于临床资料和医嘱，而不是家属偏好。

testTakingStrategy.en: For high-alert medications, compare the order with the current assessment. If the current data make administration dangerous, hold and clarify before giving the dose.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 遇到高警讯药物时，要把医嘱与当前评估相比较。如果当前资料显示给药危险，应先暂停并澄清，再考虑给药。

glossary.defZh: INR高于目标范围，提示抗凝过强、出血风险增加。
发现给药可能不安全时，护士暂不执行并及时联系医生确认医嘱。
一旦使用错误可能造成严重伤害的药物，如华法林、胰岛素、肝素等。

stem.en: During medication reconciliation, the wife reports giving naproxen 220 mg twice in the past 2 days. Which nursing responses are appropriate? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 药物核对时，妻子报告过去2天给患者服用萘普生220 mg两次。哪些护理反应是合适的？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Document the naproxen dose and timing and notify the provider because this exposure changes the bleeding-risk assessment.
options.zh: 记录萘普生剂量和时间，并通知医生，因为该暴露会改变出血风险评估。

options.en: Teach the client and wife to avoid NSAIDs unless specifically approved by the anticoagulation prescriber.
options.zh: 教育患者和妻子：除非抗凝处方医生明确批准，否则应避免NSAID。

options.en: Explain that NSAIDs can increase bleeding risk through platelet inhibition and gastrointestinal mucosal injury, even when the INR does not fully explain the bleeding.
options.zh: 解释NSAID可通过抑制血小板和损伤胃肠黏膜增加出血风险，即使INR不能完全解释出血也如此。

options.en: Instruct the client to stop eating dark green vegetables permanently to prevent future warfarin interactions.
options.zh: 指导患者永久停止食用深绿色蔬菜，以预防未来华法林相互作用。

options.en: Tell the wife that over-the-counter medications should be checked with the anticoagulation clinic or prescriber before use.
options.zh: 告知妻子，使用非处方药前应先与抗凝门诊或处方医生确认。

options.en: Reassure the family that two doses of naproxen are too few to be clinically relevant.
options.zh: 安慰家属，两次萘普生剂量太少，不具有临床意义。

correct.en: Naproxen exposure is clinically relevant in a client taking warfarin with active bleeding. The nurse should document and escalate the finding, teach avoidance of unapproved NSAIDs, explain the bleeding mechanisms in practical terms, and involve the caregiver who manages medications at home.
correct.zh: 对于正在使用华法林且有活动性出血的患者，萘普生暴露具有临床意义。护士应记录并上报该发现，教育避免未经批准的NSAID，用实用语言解释出血机制，并让在家管理药物的照护者参与。

byChoice.en: Correct. Dose and timing help the provider interpret the bleeding trajectory and reversal needs.
byChoice.zh: 正确。剂量和时间有助于医生判断出血趋势和逆转治疗需求。

byChoice.en: Correct. NSAIDs can substantially increase bleeding risk in clients taking warfarin; exceptions such as aspirin require explicit prescriber direction.
byChoice.zh: 正确。NSAID可显著增加华法林患者出血风险；如阿司匹林等例外情况需医生明确指示。

byChoice.en: Correct. NSAID-related bleeding risk is not only an INR issue; platelet function and GI mucosal injury also matter.
byChoice.zh: 正确。NSAID相关出血风险不只是INR问题；血小板功能和胃肠黏膜损伤也很重要。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Warfarin teaching emphasizes consistent vitamin K intake, not permanent elimination of nutritious foods.
byChoice.zh: 错误。华法林教育强调维生素K摄入保持稳定，而不是永久禁止营养食物。

byChoice.en: Correct. Over-the-counter medications are a common source of anticoagulation interactions and should be screened before use.
byChoice.zh: 正确。非处方药是抗凝相互作用的常见来源，使用前应先筛查。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Even short NSAID exposure can be important when the client is actively bleeding and anticoagulated.
byChoice.zh: 错误。患者已有活动性出血且正在抗凝时，即使短期NSAID暴露也可能重要。

testTakingStrategy.en: When an anticoagulated client bleeds, look beyond the prescribed anticoagulant. OTC pain relievers, antibiotics, herbals, poor intake, and kidney or liver changes can all shift risk.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 抗凝患者出血时，不要只看处方抗凝药。非处方止痛药、抗生素、草药、进食差以及肾肝功能变化都可能改变风险。

glossary.defZh: 一种NSAID止痛药，可增加抗凝患者出血风险。
系统核实患者实际使用的处方药、非处方药及补充剂。
血小板聚集功能下降，导致初期止血能力减弱。

questions.topic: vitamin K route and dose selection

stem.en: The provider orders vitamin K 2.5 mg by mouth during Stage 1. Complete the teaching statement the nurse should use to explain the plan.
stem.zh: 阶段1医生医嘱口服维生素K 2.5 mg。完成护士用于解释治疗计划的教育语句。

clozeStem.en: Because the client has {{1}} and also has {{2}}, the goal is to lower the INR carefully without causing {{3}}.
clozeStem.zh: 由于患者有 {{1}}，同时还有 {{2}}，目标是在不导致 {{3}} 的情况下降低INR。

options.en: minor mucocutaneous bleeding without hemodynamic instability
options.zh: 无血流动力学不稳定的轻度黏膜皮肤出血

options.en: massive hemorrhage with shock
options.zh: 伴休克的大量出血

options.en: suspected valve thrombosis
options.zh: 疑似瓣膜血栓形成

options.en: a mechanical mitral valve that requires ongoing anticoagulation
options.zh: 需要持续抗凝的机械性二尖瓣

options.en: a bioprosthetic valve that never requires anticoagulation
options.zh: 绝不需要抗凝的生物瓣

options.en: a contraindication to all vitamin K products
options.zh: 所有维生素K制剂均禁忌

options.en: overcorrection to a subtherapeutic INR and valve thrombosis risk
options.zh: 过度逆转至INR低于治疗范围并增加瓣膜血栓风险

options.en: immediate hemolysis from oral vitamin K
options.zh: 口服维生素K导致立即溶血

options.en: loss of platelet production from vitamin K
options.zh: 维生素K导致血小板生成丧失

correct.en: At Stage 1 the client is bleeding, but the bleeding is mucocutaneous and hemodynamics are stable. Low-dose oral vitamin K provides a controlled partial reversal, which is important because mechanical mitral valves require ongoing anticoagulation and overcorrection can create thrombosis risk.
correct.zh: 阶段1患者确有出血，但属于黏膜皮肤出血且血流动力学稳定。低剂量口服维生素K可较可控地部分逆转，这一点很重要，因为机械性二尖瓣需要持续抗凝，过度逆转会增加血栓风险。

byChoice.en: The correct Stage 1 severity is minor mucocutaneous bleeding without shock. Major hemorrhage would change the reversal strategy.
byChoice.zh: 阶段1正确的严重程度是无休克的轻度黏膜皮肤出血。若为严重出血，逆转策略会改变。

byChoice.en: The mechanical mitral valve is the key competing risk: the client needs anticoagulation long term even while bleeding must be controlled.
byChoice.zh: 机械性二尖瓣是关键的竞争性风险：即使需要控制出血，患者长期仍需要抗凝。

byChoice.en: The danger of excessive reversal is a subtherapeutic INR with valve thrombosis or embolic complications.
byChoice.zh: 过度逆转的危险是INR低于治疗范围，导致瓣膜血栓或栓塞并发症。

testTakingStrategy.en: Match reversal intensity to bleeding severity and thrombotic risk. Stable minor bleeding allows controlled correction; unstable major bleeding requires faster reversal.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 逆转强度要与出血严重程度和血栓风险匹配。稳定的轻度出血可控制性纠正；不稳定的严重出血需要更快速逆转。

glossary.defZh: 如牙龈出血、鼻出血、瘀斑等来自黏膜或皮肤的出血表现。
抗凝强度不足，血栓形成风险增加。
血栓附着或阻塞人工瓣膜，可导致瓣膜功能障碍或栓塞。

stem.en: At 0645, the client has INR 6.8, hemoglobin 9.2 g/dL, new gross hematuria, positive stool guaiac, HR 98, BP 100/60, and lightheadedness. Classify each nursing action.
stem.zh: 0645时，患者INR 6.8，血红蛋白9.2 g/dL，新发肉眼血尿，粪便隐血阳性，心率98次/分，血压100/60 mmHg，并诉头晕。请对每项护理措施分类。

rows.en: Page/call the provider with a concise STAT report of INR, hemoglobin drop, new bleeding, tachycardia, and hypotension.
rows.zh: 用简洁的STAT报告联系医生，说明INR、血红蛋白下降、新出血、心动过速和低血压。

rows.en: Position the client supine, raise the legs slightly if tolerated, maintain telemetry, and increase vital signs to every 15 minutes.
rows.zh: 让患者平卧，若能耐受可轻微抬高下肢，维持心电监护，并将生命体征频率增加至每15分钟。

rows.en: Verify IV access and prepare isotonic fluid bolus/transfusion support according to protocol or rapid provider order.
rows.zh: 确认静脉通路，并按流程或快速医嘱准备等渗液体快速补液/输血支持。

rows.en: Administer the scheduled metoprolol and furosemide because they are cardiac medications.
rows.zh: 因美托洛尔和呋塞米是心脏用药，照常给予计划剂量。

rows.en: Perform a focused neurologic assessment and continue close neurologic monitoring.
rows.zh: 进行重点神经系统评估，并继续密切神经系统监测。

correct.en: The client has evolved from minor bleeding to major bleeding with early hemodynamic compromise. The nurse prioritizes escalation, circulation support, preparation for reversal/transfusion, frequent monitoring, and neurologic surveillance while holding medications that may worsen hypovolemia or mask compensation until clarified.
correct.zh: 患者已由轻度出血进展为伴早期血流动力学受损的严重出血。护士应优先升级报告、支持循环、准备逆转/输血、密切监测及神经系统观察，并在澄清前暂停可能加重低血容量或掩盖代偿反应的药物。

byChoice.en: This is a priority because the provider needs the concise trend and instability data to order urgent reversal and transfusion support.
byChoice.zh: 这是优先措施，因为医生需要简洁的趋势和不稳定资料以开立紧急逆转和输血支持医嘱。

byChoice.en: This supports circulation and increases detection of worsening hemorrhagic shock.
byChoice.zh: 该措施支持循环，并提高发现出血性休克恶化的能力。

byChoice.en: This prepares for immediate volume and blood-product support without independently exceeding nursing scope.
byChoice.zh: 该措施为立即容量和血制品支持做准备，同时不超出护士独立执业范围。

byChoice.en: This is unsafe. A beta blocker may blunt compensatory tachycardia, and a diuretic can worsen intravascular depletion during active hemorrhage; hold and clarify.
byChoice.zh: 这是不安全的。β受体阻滞剂可能抑制代偿性心动过速，利尿剂可在活动性出血时加重血容量不足；应暂停并澄清。

byChoice.en: This is a priority because severe coagulopathy can cause occult intracranial bleeding even before focal symptoms appear.
byChoice.zh: 这是优先措施，因为严重凝血异常可在出现局灶症状前发生隐匿性颅内出血。

testTakingStrategy.en: With acute bleeding plus falling hemoglobin and unstable vital signs, think circulation first: escalate, support perfusion, prepare blood products, and avoid medications that worsen compensation.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 急性出血伴血红蛋白下降和生命体征不稳定时，先考虑循环：升级报告、支持灌注、准备血制品，并避免会削弱代偿的药物。

glossary.defZh: 尿液中有血，可呈粉红、红色或茶色。
血压、心率、灌注等指标提示循环功能受到威胁。
检测粪便中肉眼不可见或少量血液的检查。

questions.topic: IV vitamin K and PCC administration safety

stem.en: The provider orders IV vitamin K and 4-factor PCC for major bleeding. Which nursing actions are appropriate? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 医生因严重出血开立静脉维生素K和四因子PCC。哪些护理措施是适当的？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Verify the orders, allergies, baseline vital signs, IV patency, product availability, and required second-nurse checks before administration.
options.zh: 给药前核对医嘱、过敏史、基线生命体征、静脉通路通畅性、制品可用性及所需双人核对。

options.en: Dilute vitamin K as ordered and infuse it by pump over the ordered time rather than giving a rapid IV push.
options.zh: 按医嘱稀释维生素K，并用输液泵按规定时间输注，而不是快速静推。

options.en: Monitor during vitamin K infusion for hypotension, flushing, dyspnea, chest tightness, or other hypersensitivity findings.
options.zh: 维生素K输注期间监测低血压、潮红、呼吸困难、胸闷或其他超敏反应表现。

options.en: Administer 4-factor PCC promptly according to institutional protocol with required verification and monitoring.
options.zh: 按照机构流程经必要核对和监测后及时给予四因子PCC。

options.en: Reassess vital signs, bleeding sites, urine color and output, neurologic status, hemoglobin, and repeat INR as ordered.
options.zh: 按医嘱再评估生命体征、出血部位、尿色和尿量、神经状态、血红蛋白及复查INR。

options.en: Delay PCC until the vitamin K infusion is complete and a repeat INR confirms that the vitamin K has not corrected the coagulopathy.
options.zh: 等维生素K输注完成并复查INR确认尚未纠正凝血异常后，再延迟给予PCC。

correct.en: Appropriate nursing care includes verification before high-risk products, slow diluted IV vitamin K administration with hypersensitivity monitoring, prompt PCC administration per protocol for rapid factor replacement, and close reassessment of bleeding and laboratory response. These actions may overlap in real practice and should not be forced into a single linear sequence.
correct.zh: 适当的护理包括在高风险制品给药前进行核对，按要求稀释并缓慢输注静脉维生素K且监测超敏反应，按流程及时给予PCC以快速补充凝血因子，并密切复评出血和化验反应。这些措施在实际工作中可能同时进行，不应被强行排成单一线性顺序。

byChoice.en: Verification is necessary because both vitamin K reversal and PCC are high-risk interventions in a client with simultaneous bleeding and thrombosis risks.
byChoice.zh: 核对是必要的，因为在同时有出血和血栓风险的患者中，维生素K逆转和PCC均属高风险干预。

byChoice.en: IV vitamin K should be diluted and infused slowly; rapid IV push increases reaction risk without making hepatic clotting-factor synthesis immediate.
byChoice.zh: 静脉维生素K应稀释后缓慢输注；快速静推会增加反应风险，却不能让肝脏立即合成凝血因子。

byChoice.en: Monitoring during vitamin K infusion is appropriate because hypotension or respiratory symptoms could destabilize an already bleeding client.
byChoice.zh: 维生素K输注期间监测是适当的，因为低血压或呼吸症状可能使已出血患者进一步不稳定。

byChoice.en: PCC provides rapid exogenous vitamin K-dependent clotting factors and should be administered promptly according to institutional protocol once ordered and verified.
byChoice.zh: PCC可快速提供外源性维生素K依赖性凝血因子；医嘱核对后应按机构流程及时给药。

byChoice.en: Reassessment determines whether reversal is effective and whether bleeding, transfusion need, neurologic status, or thrombotic risk is changing.
byChoice.zh: 复评可判断逆转是否有效，以及出血、输血需求、神经状态或血栓风险是否变化。

byChoice.en: Delaying PCC until vitamin K has time to work is unsafe in major bleeding because PCC is ordered to provide immediate clotting factor replacement while vitamin K provides sustained reversal.
byChoice.zh: 在严重出血时等维生素K起效后才给PCC是不安全的；PCC的目的正是立即补充凝血因子，而维生素K提供持续逆转。

testTakingStrategy.en: For SATA items about urgent reversal, choose actions that are independently safe and necessary; do not assume a rigid order unless the stem explicitly asks for one and the steps are truly sequential.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 遇到紧急逆转相关的多选题时，选择本身安全且必要的措施；除非题干明确要求排序且步骤确实必须先后执行，否则不要假设固定顺序。

glossary.defZh: 维生素K1制剂，可用于逆转华法林抗凝作用。
用于改善血容量和携氧能力的红细胞血制品。
药物或血制品相关异常免疫/过敏反应，可表现为潮红、呼吸困难、胸闷、低血压等。

stem.en: At 1200, the INR is 3.8, hemoglobin is 9.8 g/dL after transfusion support, blood pressure has improved, urine is clearing, head CT is negative, and GI/urology consults are pending. Which handoff statement best reflects the client's current priority?
stem.zh: 1200时，INR为3.8，输血支持后血红蛋白为9.8 g/dL，血压改善，尿液正在转清，头颅CT阴性，胃肠科/泌尿科会诊待完成。哪项交班内容最能反映患者当前优先事项？

options.en: The hemorrhagic crisis is improving, but the client still requires close monitoring for both rebleeding and valve thrombosis as reversal continues.
options.zh: 出血危象正在改善，但随着逆转作用持续，患者仍需密切监测再出血和瓣膜血栓两方面风险。

options.en: The INR is close enough to the target range that routine every-4-hour vital signs are sufficient and hourly urine assessment can stop.
options.zh: INR已足够接近目标范围，因此每4小时常规生命体征即可，并可停止每小时尿液评估。

options.en: Because the head CT is negative, neurologic checks and fall precautions are no longer necessary.
options.zh: 由于头颅CT阴性，已不再需要神经系统检查和跌倒预防。

options.en: Warfarin should be restarted immediately by the nurse to prevent mechanical valve thrombosis.
options.zh: 护士应立即重新开始华法林，以预防机械瓣血栓形成。

correct.en: The trend is improving but not resolved. The client remains in a transition period: bleeding appears controlled but the bleeding source has not been fully evaluated, and ongoing vitamin K effect may push INR below target, increasing mechanical valve thrombosis risk. Restarting anticoagulation is anticipated but is a provider decision after bleeding control.
correct.zh: 趋势正在改善但尚未完全解决。患者仍处于过渡期：出血似乎受控，但出血来源尚未完全评估；维生素K作用仍可能持续使INR降至目标以下，增加机械瓣血栓风险。重新开始抗凝可预期，但应由医生在出血受控后决定。

byChoice.en: Correct. This statement captures both competing risks and the need for continued close reassessment.
byChoice.zh: 正确。该陈述同时涵盖两种竞争性风险，并强调需要继续密切复评。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. INR and bleeding are still changing, the source is not fully identified, and recent instability warrants continued close monitoring.
byChoice.zh: 错误。INR和出血情况仍在变化，出血来源尚未完全明确，且近期不稳定提示仍需密切监测。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. A negative CT is reassuring but does not eliminate risk while coagulopathy and fall risk persist.
byChoice.zh: 错误。CT阴性令人安心，但在凝血异常和跌倒风险仍存在时，不能消除风险。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Mechanical valve thrombosis risk must be anticipated, but restarting warfarin timing and dosing are provider decisions and require bleeding control.
byChoice.zh: 错误。机械瓣血栓风险必须预见，但重新开始华法林的时间和剂量属于医生决定，并需先控制出血。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a client improves after emergency treatment, do not assume the case is finished. Identify what is better, what remains unresolved, and what new risk treatment created.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 患者经紧急治疗后好转时，不要认为问题已经结束。要识别哪些已改善、哪些尚未解决，以及治疗本身带来了什么新风险。

glossary.defZh: 原有出血暂时停止或减轻后再次发生或加重。
血栓形成并可能脱落阻塞远端血管，导致卒中、肢体缺血等。
护士之间交接患者病情、风险、待办事项和护理重点的沟通过程。

correct.en: This case tests the competing priorities of hemorrhage control and mandatory anticoagulation after mechanical mitral valve replacement. The nurse must hold unsafe warfarin administration, recognize NSAID exposure as a clinically meaningful bleeding-risk amplifier, understand calibrated oral vitamin K for stable minor bleeding, escalate rapidly when hematuria, positive stool guaiac, falling hemoglobin, rising INR, tachycardia, and hypotension signal major hemorrhage, administer urgent reversal products safely, and continue monitoring for both rebleeding and thrombotic complications during the reversal period.
correct.zh: 本病例考查机械性二尖瓣置换术后“控制出血”与“必须抗凝”之间的竞争性优先事项。护士必须在给华法林不安全时暂停并澄清，识别NSAID暴露会显著放大出血风险，理解稳定轻度出血时低剂量口服维生素K的可控逆转思路；当血尿、粪便隐血阳性、血红蛋白下降、INR升高、心动过速和低血压提示严重出血时迅速升级处理；安全给予紧急逆转制品；并在逆转期持续监测再出血和血栓并发症。

testTakingStrategy.en: In anticoagulation cases, always hold two risks together: too much anticoagulation causes bleeding, but too little anticoagulation can cause thrombosis when the indication is mandatory, such as a mechanical mitral valve.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 抗凝相关病例中，要始终同时考虑两种风险：抗凝过强会出血，但在机械性二尖瓣等必须抗凝的情况下，抗凝不足又会导致血栓。

glossary.defZh: 评估华法林抗凝强度的凝血指标；数值过高提示出血风险增加。
人工机械瓣膜，通常需要长期华法林抗凝以预防瓣膜血栓形成。
促进肝脏合成维生素K依赖性凝血因子，可用于逆转华法林作用。

glossary.termZh: 四因子凝血酶原复合物
glossary.defZh: 含凝血因子II、VII、IX、X的浓缩制剂，用于需要快速逆转华法林抗凝的严重出血。
如萘普生、布洛芬等止痛消炎药，可增加使用华法林者的出血风险。
